title: China Just Built A Two Brain AI Robot: One Body, Two Minds
summary: China released JAKA Pi, a compact humanoid robot with a split AI brain architecture for real-time thinking, vision, movement, and reaction. Vietnam introduced Dyno and VR-H3 humanoid robots for homes, security, factories, and service work. NVIDIA unveiled the Isaac GR00T robot platform with Jetson Thor, providing researchers a six-foot robot with over two thousand teraflops of onboard AI compute.
